title: HIRALIY 27" Tennis Rackets Set of 2, 3 Tennis Balls, 2 Racquets, 2 Overgrip Tapes and 1 Carrying Bag Outdoor Recreational Sport Game
features: 【Rackets Parameters】Head Size: 105 sq.in., Balance: 315mm, Length of the great fun rackets is about 68.5cm/ 27inch. And the size of the handle is 1.57*1.41 inch/ 4*3.6cm. Let beginners' tennis racket professional help you release your true self and regain your confidence. The design of the racket allows you to grasp the rhythm of offense and defense at any time

【What you get】 The tennis racquet set contains everything you need for a recreational tennis match: 2 rackets and 3 tennis balls together with a large handy carry bag and 2 replacement overgrip tapes. The 2 grip tapes offer much cushion and sweat absorption. No need to buy a separate tennis ball, start a tennis game anytime anywhere. One set, one journey

【Lightweight and Sturdy】Strung weight: 260g/ 9.2oz. The lightweight racket frame is made from thick and durable aluminium, not easy to weather, the combination of the handle and the face is a triangle that has a firm effect and absorbs bad vibrations, making the hitting more comfortable as well as reducing the risk of breakage. The lighter racquet is easy to hold and swing, promoting your playing experience and inspiring beginners' strong interest and confidence when playing tennis

【Ideal for Beginners or Recreational Player】Our outdoor and indoor garden tennis rackets are ideal set for beginner or recreational adult players, the portable package allows you to start a fun tennis game with families or friends after get off work or on weekends, suitable for all occasions, such as tennis courts, parks near home, beaches or school playgrounds. Kids and juniors can tackle the racquet set easily as well. Also great gifts for tennis players

【Prestrung Frame with Good Tension】Every racket is well strung by skilled workers before delivery with good tension for beginner to intermediate level of playing. The racquet strings are properly tight and not easy to lose the tension. The strings tension allows you to execute good drops and lobs. Bring tennis racket set for recreational players with little experience each time you go to a tennis court, just unleash your energy and every shot more powerful
description: This tennis rackets set includes 2 sturdy tennis rackets, 3 premium tennis balls, 2 handle overgrips and 1 carry bag. Ideal Set for Multiple Occasions: HIRALIY tennis rackets are ideal set for beginner or recreational adult player, the portable package allows you to start a fun tennis game with families or friends after get off work or on weekends, suitable for all occasions, such as tennis courts, parks near home, beaches or school playgrounds. Unleash your energy and take every shot more powerful with our tennis racquet dampener and set.
